author: White House
text: Call of Duty kill score overlays on real strike footage. Set to Childish Gambino's 'Bonfire.' Caption: 'We're winning this fight.'

author: White House
text: SpongeBob: 'Want to see me do it again?' 14 seconds. SpongeBob as superhero, then real missile strike. 'Will not stop. Unrelenting. Unapologetic.'

author: White House
text: Mortal Kombat 'FLAWLESS VICTORY' spliced with Top Gun, Iron Man, Braveheart over real bombing runs. Caption: 'JUSTICE THE AMERICAN WAY.'

author: White House
text: GTA: 'Ah sh*t, here we go again.' Grand Theft Auto: San Andreas opening, then real footage of US strike on a box truck.

author: Donald J. Trump
text: 'We don't need anybody.' Posted on Truth Social while zero allied nations had joined Operation Epic Fury. Germany: 'Not our war.'

author: Kamal Kharazi
text: Iran's foreign policy advisor on CNN, filmed inside Iran: 'It is a false narrative that Iranian capabilities have been degraded. There is no room for diplomacy anymore.'

author: Mohammad B. Ghalibaf
text: 'If the Israeli regime is unable to intercept missiles in the heavily protected Dimona area, it is, operationally, a sign of entering a new phase of the battle.'

author: Tucker Carlson
text: Piers Morgan: 'The only people who support this war are those born 1946-1964 who watch Fox News. That's it.'

author: Joe Kent
text: Former NCTC director, 20-yr Army, 11 combat deployments, Gold Star husband: 'No intelligence showed an imminent threat from Iran to the United States.'

author: Cyabra
text: 72% of Iran war deepfake engagement occurs on TikTok. 145M+ views across multilingual AI campaigns: Farsi, Arabic, Hebrew, English. Synchronized posting windows.

author: IRGC
text: Iran shuts Strait of Hormuz. Explosive drone boats, mines, shore-based missiles. 20% of world oil transits these waters. Selective passage for China, Russia, India.

author: IRGC
text: IRGC publishes video of damaged F-35A forced to emergency land. $100M aircraft hit by passive IR sensor. Stealth coating irrelevant — the sensor was looking for heat.

author: IDF
text: Iranian ballistic missiles strike Dimona and Arad. IDF admits interceptors failed. 64 wounded in Dimona, 116 in Arad. 20km from Israel's nuclear research center.
